title: General Submittals and Closeout
reference: IMDO internal review requirements and owner turnover expectations.

clauses.scope: This provision covers contractor submittals, shop drawings, product data, warranties, testing records, as-built plans, and turnover documents required for project acceptance.
materials: Submit complete technical data, brochures, samples, certificates, and other supporting documents as required by the contract documents.
execution: Do not proceed with affected work until required submittals have been reviewed as required by the contract.
Submit as-built drawings and closeout documents prior to final acceptance.
testing: Compile all test reports, inspection logs, and commissioning records required for turnover.
clauses.measurement: Unless separately indicated in the BOQ, submittals and closeout requirements shall be considered incidental to the relevant pay items.
clauses.payment: No separate payment shall be made unless specifically provided in the BOQ.

title: Low Current Systems General Requirements
reference: IMDO low-current drafting notes for FDAS, CCTV, voice, and data systems.

clauses.scope: This provision covers low-current systems such as FDAS, CCTV, voice, and data cabling including conduits, boxes, devices, labels, and testing.
materials: Use compatible cables, conduits, supports, terminations, and devices suitable for the intended system.
execution: Coordinate low-current routing with electrical, architectural, and structural requirements.
Provide labeling and identification for panels, devices, and cable terminations.
testing: Perform continuity, device checks, and functional testing before turnover.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include all accessories, testing, and incidentals for complete functioning systems.
